CREATE TABLE series_advanced AS (SELECT number AS value FROM numbers(100));
SELECT skewPop(value) FROM series_advanced WHERE value < 50;
SELECT skewPop(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM series_with_value_column UNION ALL SELECT value * 2 FROM series_with_value_column);
CREATE TABLE series_join AS (SELECT number AS id, rand() AS value FROM numbers(10));
CREATE TABLE series_join2 AS (SELECT number AS id, rand() AS value2 FROM numbers(10));
SELECT skewPop(s1.value) FROM series_join s1 JOIN series_join2 s2 ON s1.id = s2.id;
WITH (SELECT count() FROM series_join) AS cnt SELECT skewPop(value) FROM series_with_value_column WHERE cnt > 0;
SELECT skewPop(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM series_with_value_column LIMIT 10) AS subquery;
SELECT skewPop(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM series_with_value_column WHERE value > 0) AS filtered;
SELECT skewPop(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM series_with_value_column WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS non_null_values;
